name: Vegetable and Cheese Strata
recipeIngredient: enought Italian bread cut into 1-inch cubes to measure 9 cups about 1 1/2 loaves
2 1/2 cups extra sharp Cheddar, coarsely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet cook the onion, scallion, and mushrooms in oil over moderately low heat, stirring until the onion is softened. Add the bell peppers and season with salt and pepper. Cook the mixture over moderate heat, stirring for 10 to 15 minutes or until all liquid has evaporated and peppers are tender.
2. Arrange half the bread cubes in a buttered large shallow baking dish. Spread half the vegetable mixture over them. Sprinkle half the Cheddar and Parmesan over the vegetables.
3. Arrange the remaining bread cubes over the cheeses. Top with the remaining vegetables and sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
4. In a bowl whisk together eggs, milk, dijon mustard, tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper. Pour egg mixture evenly over the strata and chill covered overnight.
5. Let the strata stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before baking in the middle of a preheated oven at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes or until puffed and golden and cooked through.
